title: betonica officinalis var. stricta
intro: Betonica officinalis var. stricta, also known as Lamiophylum strictum, is a plant species within the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is a variety of the betonica officinalis plant. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of betonica officinalis var. stricta include its ability to relieve headaches, improve digestion, and reduce anxiety and stress. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
